title: Archer’s Plushies
description: Adds cute lil plushies to accompany you on your adventures
body:
# ![chicken_plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57e40a169ebb753d433d17077a874a1b9ce71316.png) !! **REQUIRES FORGE OR NEOFORGE** !! ![bee_plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bd90050f4f7e04dfb63638c160f31070fa7f9f0.png)
A plushie mod containing over 40+ assets! Each plushie having the ability to be squished to play a sound.

![axolotl plushie :o](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a3f4e327fd05c0acda662b306370ea65741896e.gif)

![chicken_jockey_plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b12d1bd109169daa506c71bd1f1f5dcf3c6f1609.png) Jockey Plushies!
-----------------
You may notice while playing in creative that there is some jockey plushies, in order to get those you'll need the rider plushie (skeleton, zombie, or piglin) and the base plushie(spider, chicken, or strider). After placing the base plushie, you may right click while holding the rider plushie in your hand to place it onto the base plushie. Bam! You got yourself a jockey plushie! If you'd like to unequip the rider plushie, you'll need a pair of shears to remove them.

**Compatible Jockeys:**
- Chicken + Zombie
- Spider + Skeleton
- Strider + Piglin

Variants!
----------------
If you shift + right click a specific plushie you'll be able to change the variant. For now this feature is exclusive to the axolotl plushie, but in the future others will have this (such as the frog when it eventually is added).

**v You can take a look at the axolotl variants down here!**

![axolotl_variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e521311329b2fd251000a6bc5265d3f3615574ac.png)

### You should like, totally check out the short video I made down here!!! :D
